expectations.text: uses_screenshot_script: Agent executed screenshot.py via shell
expectations.evidence: Agent ran screenshot.py to capture screenshot.png

expectations.text: reads_image_file: Agent used the Read tool on a .png file
expectations.evidence: Agent read screenshot.png and evaluated its contents

expectations.text: evaluates_specific_elements: Agent mentions login form, username, or password fields specifically
expectations.evidence: Agent stated 'no username field, password field, or any login form on screen'

expectations.text: handles_missing_app_gracefully: Agent still evaluates what IS visible rather than refusing to work
expectations.evidence: Agent described the Safari tab visible (Hostinger page, video overlay) and gave actionable next steps

notes: 7 tool uses — efficient. Followed the 4-step skill workflow cleanly. Correct structured report format with Status/What was seen/Issues/Next steps.
